title: Uruguayan Shrimp Skewers
description: Garlicky and crunchy shrimp skewers with a touch of sea salt, inspired by the monsoon season in Uruguay, and prepared in a way that is friendly to the ayurvedic tamasic diet. This dish is perfect for a dinner or snack
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, garlic, sea salt, black pepper, and paprika
Add the shrimp to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade
Thread the shrimp onto skewers, leaving a small space between each shrimp
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally
Brush the shrimp with lemon juice during the last 2 minutes of grilling
Remove the skewers from the grill and sprinkle with parsley
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired
